emails.subject: Re: New Pub Posting Request
emails.body: I haven't heard anything back. I spoke with Willie on the phone Friday afternoon, and he said the best way to get this done quickly would be to send out an e-mail. I was actually just about to call and check on the request, but if you have a moment, could you find out where it's at in the chain of commmand? Thanks, Kate From: Jenny Latham 04/02/2001 10:18 AM
